attempts.strategy: Replace opaque stub with real def: absolute Ext on the scheme-theoretic fibre X(s)=f.fiber s of the restrictions I(s)=j*I, F(s)=j*F along j=f.fiberι s, wrapped in IsZero
attempts.code_tried: def FiberExtVanishes {X S : Scheme.{u}} (q : ℕ) (f : X ⟶ S) (I F : X.Modules) (s : S) : Prop := IsZero (extGroup q ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (f.fiberι s)).obj I) ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (f.fiberι s)).obj F))
attempts.insight: (s : S) feeds f.fiberι s directly — Lean auto-inserts the ↥S point coercion; signature byte-identical so all 3 downstream users (External.ext_vanishing_open, H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing, ext_finite_flat) stay well-typed. lean_verify: {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}, no sorryAx.
